prompt: Users are reporting that the game detail page looks broken on mobile devices. The rules text overflows, images don't scale, and the Japanese text rendering is sometimes illegible. The frontend CSS seems to have responsive design but it's not working correctly. How do I systematically debug and fix this?
expected_output: Responsive design debugging methodology, CSS media query issues, text overflow solutions, image scaling for multiple devices, Japanese font rendering on mobile, DevTools approach to finding the root cause

assertions.name: Responsive design debugging methodology
assertions.description: Provides a systematic methodology for debugging mobile responsiveness issues

assertions.name: CSS media query analysis
assertions.description: Discusses CSS media query issues and how to identify/fix them

assertions.name: Text overflow solutions
assertions.description: Provides specific solutions for handling text overflow in responsive design

assertions.name: Image scaling guidance
assertions.description: Explains how to properly scale images for multiple device sizes

assertions.name: Japanese font rendering
assertions.description: Addresses Japanese font rendering issues on mobile devices

assertions.name: DevTools debugging approach
assertions.description: Explains how to use browser DevTools to find and diagnose responsive design issues
